// Font families with Google Fonts
export const fontFamilies = [
  { value: "Inter", label: "Inter", googleFont: true },
  { value: "Roboto", label: "Roboto", googleFont: true },
  { value: "Poppins", label: "Poppins", googleFont: true },
  { value: "Lora", label: "Lora", googleFont: true },
  { value: "Nunito", label: "Nunito", googleFont: true },
  { value: "Quicksand", label: "Quicksand", googleFont: true },
  { value: "Playfair Display", label: "Playfair Display", googleFont: true },
  { value: "Montserrat", label: "Montserrat", googleFont: true },
  { value: "Open Sans", label: "Open Sans", googleFont: true },
  { value: "system", label: "System Default", googleFont: false },
];

// Helper to load Google Font
export const loadGoogleFont = (fontFamily) => {
  if (fontFamily === "system") return;
  
  const font = fontFamilies.find(f => f.value === fontFamily);
  if (!font || !font.googleFont) return;
  
  // Check if already loaded
  const existingLink = document.querySelector(`link[href*="${fontFamily.replace(' ', '+')}"]`);
  if (existingLink) return;
  
  // Create link element
  const link = document.createElement("link");
  link.rel = "stylesheet";
  link.href = `https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=${fontFamily.replace(' ', '+')}:wght@300;400;500;600;700&display=swap`;
  document.head.appendChild(link);
};
